detectors.description:
Reentrancy in LinearThinking._transfer(address,address,uint256) (LinearThinking.sol#645-769):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (LinearThinking.sol#709)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (LinearThinking.sol#783-795)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (LinearThinking.sol#715)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(tfrAmt) (LinearThinking.sol#805)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.sub(tfrAmt)) (LinearThinking.sol#807)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (LinearThinking.sol#767)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (LinearThinking.sol#933)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (LinearThinking.sol#913)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (LinearThinking.sol#915)
	LinearThinking._rOwned (LinearThinking.sol#321) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- LinearThinking._takeTeam(uint256) (LinearThinking.sol#927-935)
	- LinearThinking._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (LinearThinking.sol#887-923)
	- LinearThinking.balanceOf(address) (LinearThinking.sol#471-475)
	- LinearThinking.constructor() (LinearThinking.sol#405-435)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (LinearThinking.sol#767)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (LinearThinking.sol#941)
	LinearThinking._rTotal (LinearThinking.sol#333) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- LinearThinking._getCurrentSupply() (LinearThinking.sol#1083-1093)
	- LinearThinking._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (LinearThinking.sol#939-945)
	- LinearThinking.constructor() (LinearThinking.sol#405-435)
	- LinearThinking.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (LinearThinking.sol#567-589)
